3036170.name: Straight Up Poker SE
3036170.description:
The poker software made just for the love of the game.
Straight Up Poker is a poker application for people who just want to play poker their own way. This special edition is a single player highly customizable and configurable offline poker poker game with over 130 built-in types of poker, and a rules editor to create your own custom poker types.

  • All sorts of hold 'em, stud, draw, card passing, 'badugi', and mixed-game poker game types, even "dealer's choice" mixed games.
  • Customize stakes schedules, player counts/table sizes, table management types, in game hand advice and probabilities, special features like 'rabbit hunting' for any game type
  • Automatic game rule documentation, available in-game
  • Load and save games, and load replays of completed games.
  • "Career mode" manage a bankroll and play in scheduled set of games.
  • Table appearance options, change color schemes and card back and face appearances.
  • Create custom game types, select hand evaluations rules, setup split pots, pot rollovers, create custom card decks with extra cards, a subset of cards, etc. Configure relative strengths of different poker hands (eg, want straights to beat flushes? You can do that. Want to eliminate full houses as a playable hand? You can do that).
  • Over 20 different kinds on unconventional pokers hands, also called "kilters" are supported. Want to play with a Skeet or a big Dog? You can do that.
  • AI is adaptable to any kind of poker game, even custom ones. The AI does not "cheat", it has access to only the same information that a human player has.
